markets.headline: Index forecast easing; Brent -0.2%; gold -0.1%; VIX +0.7% (model estimate).
markets.method_note: Threat beta = OLS of daily log-returns on the index change at the lead lag; launch-day estimates lean on BNTI-seeded history. Association, not causation.
